hooks.command: echo 'Project: pagerduty-client (Go 1.26). Format: gofumpt. Lint: golangci-lint. Log: gechr/clog. Test: testify + httptest. British English, no Oxford comma. Run task lint && task test before committing.'

echo 'Context was compacted. Key reminders:
- Module: github.com/matcra587/pagerduty-client
- Go 1.26 with toolchain directive. Green Tea GC on by default.
- mise for platform tools (go, task, actionlint, rumdl, zizmor). go.mod tool directives for Go tools (golangci-lint, gofumpt, govulncheck).
- gechr/clog for logging, gechr/clib for Cobra extensions.
- go-pagerduty for types only. Custom HTTP transport in internal/api/.
- Agent mode: auto-detect LLM env vars, JSON envelope output.
- TUI: Bubble Tea + Lipgloss in internal/tui/.
- Rules: .claude/rules/ (go.md, project.md, tests.md, docs.md).
- Build: task build -> ./dist/. task install -> GOPATH/bin.'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep "^$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.*\.md$" | xargs -r mise exec -- rumdl fix
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || true
